b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Vector & Retrieval Weights"}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne uses hybrid scoring (vector + FTS5 + importance) for recall. These weights are configurable and auto-normalized per query."}]
d:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_TYPE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Vector quantization: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"float32"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}],", or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"bit"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.5"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector similarity weight in hybrid scoring"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_FTS_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.3"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"FTS5 text relevance weight"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_IMPORTANCE_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.2"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Importance score weight"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TEMPORAL_HALFLIFE_HOURS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"24"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Temporal boost half-life in hours"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_BEAM_OPTIMIZATIONS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable BEAM benchmark optimizations (OR semantics, larger scans)"}]]}]]}]]}]
e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Tiered Degradation"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Episodic memories degrade through 3 tiers over time. Tier 1 is full content, Tier 2 is LLM-summarized, Tier 3 is entity-extracted compressed signal."}]
10:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER2_DAYS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"30"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Days before Tier 1 degrades to Tier 2"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_DAYS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"180"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Days before Tier 2 degrades to Tier 3"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER1_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"1.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall score multiplier for Tier 1 memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER2_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.5"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall score multiplier for Tier 2 memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.25"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall score multiplier for Tier 3 memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_DEGRADE_BATCH"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"100"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Max memories per degradation cycle"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SMART_COMPRESS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable entity-aware sentence extraction for Tier 3"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_MAX_CHARS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"300"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Max characters for Tier 3 compressed content"}]]}]]}]]}]
11:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Veracity Weights"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":"Memories carry veracity labels that affect their recall weight. These multipliers tune how strongly each veracity level influences retrieval."}]
13:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_STATED_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"1.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for explicitly stated facts"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_INFERRED_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.7"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for inferred facts"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TOOL_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.5"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for tool-generated output"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_IMPORTED_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.6"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for imported facts"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_UNKNOWN_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.8"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for uncategorized/legacy facts"}]]}]]}]]}]
14:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Embeddings"}]
15:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," via fastembed (384 dimensions, local ONNX) for embedding generation. No external API key is needed for local mode."]}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":["To use a custom embedding endpoint (OpenAI-compatible), set ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_URL"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_KEY"}],". These fall back to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"OPENROUTER_BASE_URL"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"OPENROUTER_API_KEY"}]," for backward compatibility."]}]
17:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_MODEL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Embedding model (local fastembed or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"openai/*"}]," API)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_KEY"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\"\""}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["API key for remote embedding API. Falls back to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"OPENROUTER_API_KEY"}],"."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_URL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"https://openrouter.ai/api/v1"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Base URL for custom embedding API (OpenAI-compatible). Falls back to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"OPENROUTER_BASE_URL"}],"."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_DIM"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"auto (384)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Override embedding dimension for unsupported models"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDINGS_VIA_API"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"unset"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Set to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"1"}]," to explicitly route embeddings through API (needed for OpenRouter-hosted models)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_NO_EMBEDDINGS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"unset"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Set to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"1"}]," to disable dense vector retrieval entirely (falls back to FTS5 keyword-only)"]}]]}]]}]]}]
18:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Local LLM (Sleep Summarization)"}]
19:["$","p",null,{"children":"The sleep/consolidation cycle can use a local or remote LLM to summarize grouped working memories before promoting them to episodic memory."}]
1a:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_ENABLED"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable LLM-based summarization during sleep"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"OpenAI-compatible API base URL for remote LLM"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_API_KEY"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"API key for the remote LLM endpoint"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_MODEL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Model name for endpoint"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_MAX_TOKENS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"2048"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Max output tokens for generated threads for local LLM inference"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_N_CTX"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"2048"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Context window size for the local LLM"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_REPO"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"TheBloke/TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat-v1.0-GGUF"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"GGUF model repository"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_FILE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"tinyllama-1.1b-chat-v1.0.Q4_K_M.gguf"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"GGUF model filename"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SLEEP_PROMPT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","em",null,{"children":"(built-in)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Custom consolidation prompt. Supports ",["$","code",null,{"children":"{source}"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"{memories}"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"{memory_count}"}]," placeholders."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_FORCE_LOCAL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"unset"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Set to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"1"}]," to force local inference even when a remote endpoint is configured"]}]]}]]}]]}]
1b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Host LLM Backend (Hermes Integration)"}]
1c:["$","p",null,{"children":"When running inside Hermes, the host agent can provide an LLM backend for consolidation — avoiding duplicate API calls."}]
1d:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_ENABLED"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Route LLM calls through Hermes' authenticated client"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_PROVIDER"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Provider name override (e.g. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"openai-codex"}],")"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_MODEL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Model name override"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_N_CTX"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"32000"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Prompt context budget for host LLM path"}]]}]]}]]}]
1e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Multi-Agent Identity"}]
1f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Filter memories by author and channel for multi-agent or multi-tenant deployments."}]
20:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTHOR_ID"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Default author identifier"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTHOR_TYPE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Author category: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"human"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"agent"}],", or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"system"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_CHANNEL_ID"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Default channel identifier for cross-session memory"}]]}]]}]]}]
21:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Auto-Sleep & SHMR"}]
22:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_SLEEP_ENABLED"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable auto-sleep after memory threshold is exceeded (Hermes integration)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_SLEEP_TIMEOUT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"5"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Auto-sleep timeout in seconds before forced termination"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_BATCH_SIZE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"50"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SHMR batch size for harmony cycles"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_MAX_ITERATIONS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"3"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SHMR max iterations per cluster"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_SIMILARITY_THRESHOLD"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.70"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SHMR cosine similarity threshold"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_HARMONY_THRESHOLD"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.60"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SHMR harmony score threshold"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_MODEL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\"\""}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Model override for SHMR harmony scoring (empty = default)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_MIN_CLUSTER_SIZE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"2"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Minimum memories to form a SHMR cluster"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_TEMPERATURE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.2"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"LLM temperature for SHMR analysis"}]]}]]}]]}]
23:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Memory Extraction (MEMORIA)"}]
24:["$","p",null,{"children":"Structured fact extraction uses a dedicated model and prompt template. These control how MEMORIA extracts facts, timelines, preferences, and instructions from conversation content."}]
25:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EXTRACTION_MODEL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"google/gemini-2.5-flash"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Model for structured extraction into MEMORIA tables"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EXTRACTION_PROMPT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","em",null,{"children":"(embedded)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Custom extraction prompt. Overrides the default MEMORIA extraction template."}]]}]]}]]}]
26:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Blob Storage"}]
27:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_BLOB_DIR"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/blobs"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Root directory for content-addressed blob storage (images, data URIs, binary)"}]]}]}]]}]
28:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Logging & MCP"}]
29:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LOG_TOOLS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Opt-in tool call logging in hermes_plugin"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_MCP_BANK"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"default"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Default bank for MCP server"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_MCP_TOKEN"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\"\""}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Bearer token for non-loopback MCP SSE connections"}]]}]]}]]}]
2a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"YAML Configuration"}]
2b:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne integrates with the Hermes ",["$","code",null,{"children":"config.yaml"}]," file (not a standalone ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne.yaml"}],"). Configure settings under the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memory.mnemosyne"}]," key:"]}]
2c:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-yaml","children":"# config.yaml (Hermes project root)\nmemory:\n  mnemosyne:\n    # Auto-sleep consolidation\n    auto_sleep: false             # Auto-run sleep() when working memory exceeds threshold\n    sleep_threshold: 50           # Working memory count before auto-sleep triggers\n\n    # Vector configuration\n    vector_type: int8             # Quantization: float32, int8, or bit\n\n    # Multi-tenant & identity\n    profile_isolation: false      # Separate SQLite DB per Hermes profile\n    shared_surface_read: false    # Merge shared-surface results into recall\n\n    # Pattern filtering\n    ignore_patterns:              # Content patterns to skip during remember()\n      - \"be ACTIVE\"               # Skill refinement boilerplate\n      - \"nothing to change\"       # No-op responses\n      - \"skill.*refined\"          # Wildcard match\n"}]}]
2d:["$","p",null,{"children":"Config file lookup order (first found wins):"}]
2e:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"./config.yaml"}]," (current working directory)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/config.yaml"}]," (user-level)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Environment variables (fallback for any setting not in config.yaml)"}],"\n"]}]
2f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Programmatic Configuration"}]
30:["$","p",null,{"children":["No config file is needed. You can create a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," instance directly in Python:"]}]
31:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(\n    session_id=\"my-agent\",        # Scope working memories to this session\n    db_path=\"./my-memory.db\",     # Custom SQLite database path (optional)\n    bank=\"work\",                  # Named memory bank for isolation\n    author_id=\"alice\",            # Multi-agent identity\n    author_type=\"human\",          # \"human\", \"agent\", or \"system\"\n    channel_id=\"team-slack\",      # Cross-session channel\n)\n"}]}]
32:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Parameter"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\"default\""}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Session identifier for scoping working memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"db_path"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str | None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Path to the SQLite database file (auto-created if None)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"bank"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str | None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Named memory bank — each bank gets its own isolated SQLite file under ",["$","code",null,{"children":"data_dir/banks/"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str | None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Author identifier for multi-agent memory scoping"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"author_type"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str | None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Author category: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"human\""}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"agent\""}],", or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"system\""}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"channel_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str | None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Channel identifier for cross-session shared memory"}]]}]]}]]}]
33:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3a",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Local-first by default"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne requires no external API keys for basic usage. Embeddings use ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," via fastembed (384-dimensional, local ONNX runtime). The sleep/consolidation cycle defaults to a local TinyLlama GGUF model. You only need API keys if you configure a remote LLM endpoint via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL"}]," or remote embeddings via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_URL"}],"."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
